issues.description: Condition missing: must check 'HasAttachedDon' with value 0 OR value 8+. Current condition is 'Always', which ignores the card's core requirement.
Action type incorrect: 'GiveDon' adds DON!! to your pool. Should be 'AttachDon' to set DON!! as active on your field.
Trigger should specify '[Activate: Main]' context; 'Activated' alone is correct trigger type but condition must enforce the DON!! count restriction.
